info.name: Nginx Version Detection
info.description: Detects the version of the running Nginx server from response headers.

info.name: Exposed .git Config
info.description: A publicly accessible .git/config file can leak repository URLs, branch names and, combined with directory listing, the full source code of the application.
info.remediation: Block access to the .git directory at the web server level, or ensure the repository is not deployed inside the web root.

info.name: Missing Security Headers
info.description: One or more recommended HTTP security headers (Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, Strict-Transport-Security) are absent.
info.remediation: Add the missing security headers at the web server or application layer.
